description: Atana harmonisation crosswalk — maps every national cultural-statistics classification in the corpus (INEGI CSCM, DANE CSECC, SInCA CSC, CSCCR) plus UNCTAD CER and IBGE NCM onto the 14-domain 2025 UNESCO FCS spine, with explicit mapping-confidence and gap notes.
source: Atana — curated artifact, not raw source data. The mappings are transcribed from the four Phase 3 methodology docs and the Phase 3 schema-design document.
grain: one row per classification code (source_schema, source_code)
fcs_spine: 2025 UNESCO Framework for Cultural Statistics — 7 cultural + 7 transversal domains
licence: CC BY 4.0 (Atana) — the underlying classifications retain their own licences
notes: Un-timestamped: this is a living reference table, regenerated by the build script — not a versioned snapshot. Bundle values in fcs2025_domain (containing ';' or '/', or starting 'Multiple') and NULL domains are the documented many-to-many / no-equivalent cases — never silently reconciled.
